aemContentFragment.descriptionHtml: Browse fresh fruit and vegetables online. Stock up on your favourite seasonal fruit & veg from apples and bananas to avocados, tomatoes and broccoli. Buy from Coles online and get home delivery or pick up from a store near you. Make your fruit and vegetables shine with our popular vegetarian and vegan recipes.
